title: Cyclosorus × occultus
taxonomy: Cyclosorus × occultus is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is a hybrid of the Cyclosorus species. It belongs to the genus Cyclosorus and is a type of fern. The classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships. Further research may be necessary for a more precise classification.

intro: Cyclosorus × occultus, also known as the hybrid lady fern, is a rare hybrid species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Cyclosorus × occultus include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are also sometimes used in capsule or tablet form to leverage its health benefits.
